feed.title: AO3 - Derek Hale/Stiles Stilinski (Filtered)
feed.subtitle: Latest works for Derek Hale/Stiles Stilinski on Archive of Our Own [English, No ABO]

entry.title: My mother cursed Derek (english version)
entry.summary:
Author: Marlowe89

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 9,918Chapters: 5/?Kudos: 40

Summary: Stiles is tired of always being the second best, never anyone's priority. He loves Derek madly, and because of this unrequited feeling, he decides to cast a spell to erase all the emotional attachment he had. Mother Claudia, a ghost who haunts her child, decides to curse Derek.

  • Creator Chose Not To Use Archive Warnings

entry.title: An Endless Road to (re)Discover
entry.summary:
Author: evvrythingisawesome

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 19,567Chapters: 10/?Kudos: 22

Summary: Sheriff Stilinski recovers from his injury and tries to keep the pack together in the absence of their Alpha; Chris Argent struggles with guilt over his role in the pack's recent troubles; Teal'c tries to balance his responsibilities to the pack with his obligations to the Free Jaffa Nation and the SGC; Daniel Jackson supports Derek through his quest for the truth of his lost Hale ancestor and his search for his sister.

  • No Archive Warnings Apply

entry.title: What I Never Said
entry.summary:
Author: StormyBlack

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 5,942Chapters: 2/?Kudos: 138

Summary: Stiles is leaving for college—and maybe, for good. But before he goes, there's one last thing he needs to do: deliver a letter he was never brave enough to send. He doesn’t expect Derek to be there. He certainly doesn’t expect a goodbye that nearly breaks him. Years of unsaid things, quiet glances, and missed chances all come pouring out in ink—because if Stiles can’t have the future he wants, he’ll at least leave behind the truth.

  • Creator Chose Not To Use Archive Warnings

entry.title: A Very Stilinski Affair
entry.summary:
Author: Christina786

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 78,240Chapters: 13/15Kudos: 23

Summary: Derek frowned. “You Stilinskis really have to be that honest?”She shrugged. “What’s the point in being secretive and mysterious?”Now Derek grinned “Oh, you should meet my uncle, you’d hate him.” This is based on a post on tumblr in which Stiles is afraid that Derek might fall for his sibling once he meets them. It kind of got out of hand and I started indulging in some morally gray but not evil Peter. Basically, Peter falls for Stiles' sister instead, because they kind of bond over their different but slightly similar traumas and it turns out Stiles' sister has been hiding a few bodies in her closet.

  • Creator Chose Not To Use Archive Warnings

entry.title: Neal's Therapist
entry.summary:
Author: Tankeika

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 221,989Chapters: 17/18Kudos: 22

Summary: Neal Caffrey is picked up from prison by Peter to begin their work together. It goes well, at first. Until a few weeks in when Neal makes a run for it for the first time, cutting his anklet, unknowingly giving the now divorced, Peter Burke, the perfect opportunity to finally enact his long awaited plan. For those here for the Derek/Stiles tag, they're introduced in chapter 9! Sorry it took so long, and thanks for your patience!!!! ❤️

entry.title: Of Silver & Amber
entry.summary:
Author: DarkInsanity (Stereklenidus)

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 10,463Chapters: 3/?Kudos: 33

Summary: When the mayor of Beacon's Hollow hires Derek Hale—a Witcher of the School of the Wolf—to clear a rotfiend den beneath a reclusive warlock's tower, Derek expects the usual: a contract, a monster, and solitude.What he gets is three mercenaries who refuse to stop following him, a bard on a donkey with strong opinions about hills, a warlock who won't answer his door, and a goblin with very specific grievances.Also a unicorn. The unicorn is not helping.Derek Hale does not fail. He does not need backup. He does not—under any circumstances—feel things about the people who keep showing up anyway.(He is, it turns out, wrong about at least three of these things.)

  • Creator Chose Not To Use Archive Warnings

entry.title: open water
entry.summary:
Author: sparassiss

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 7,141Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 38

Summary: “I’m sorry I’ve been so busy,” Stiles says the next night, much to Derek’s surprise. Stiles sinks against him in the entryway and Derek clings back tightly, taking all he can get.  He presses a kiss to Stiles’ shoulder, stalling for time. He must say his next words correctly, perfectly. To make Stiles stay. So Derek will look good in his eyes. So Stiles will still love him. “It’s okay,” is all he manages.  “I knew you’d understand,” Stiles says against Derek’s hair, but it’s hard to hear over the sound of Derek’s heart breaking.

  • No Archive Warnings Apply

entry.title: Stiles Stilinski: Emotional Support Human & Werewolf Chew Toy
entry.summary:
Author: Jinxy143

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 29,524Chapters: 5/?Kudos: 103

Summary: Stiles has options. You’re just along for the ride — so hop into Roscoe and see where this goes.Bring your Stiles body pillow. You might need it. Scott gets bitten.Everything changes. Suddenly, the world is louder, sharper, and a whole lot more dangerous — and the only thing keeping Scott from losing control is his loud-mouthed, chaos-magnet best friend, Stiles. Which would be fine.Except it’s not just Scott. Derek’s watching.Peter’s interested.And for some reason, everyone is getting a little too intense about Stiles Stilinski. Now Stiles is stuck in the middle of werewolves, bad decisions, and a rapidly escalating situation he definitely did not sign up for — while trying very hard not to think about what it means to be the thing grounding them all. Because this?This is not normal. And it’s only going to get worse.

entry.title: When Werewolves Do Jane Austen Shit
entry.summary:
Author: anarchycox

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 17,019Chapters: 4/?Kudos: 143

Summary: After the Hale Fire, Laura and Derek, along with Cora, steal comatose Peter out of the hospital. Laura gives up the alpha spark to bring Peter back. But a pack, even the mighty Hales, can only survive so long without an alpha. Derek had always known that he was to be trained for a marriage alliance with another pack, and he will do whatever it takes to keep his family safe. Stiles knows the McCall pack is on borrowed time. They've kept Beacon Hills safe, but they have no money, no history, no respect from the good side of the supernatural world. He knows they need to go to the Summit meeting...party...thing, and make connections or they are screwed. Two groups in desperate need, stuck in a conference hotel in Vegas. Whatever will happen?

  • No Archive Warnings Apply

entry.title: Shifting Fates
entry.summary:
Author: SarcasmIsMyOnlyDefence24

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 38,338Chapters: 6/?Kudos: 249

Summary: Given the chance to rewrite the past, Stiles wants to fix everything, but he'll have to start at square one. Some bonds are gone, some mistakes can’t be ignored, and some people have to die. Stiles holds everything on his shoulders. Only he knows what happens and only he can save his friends.

entry.title: Of A Butterfly's Wings
entry.summary:
Author: Mikaelsonbich25

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 145,681Chapters: 94/?Kudos: 309

Summary: Klaus had expected to be done with life after sacrificing himself. He was sure that he could finally rest and be done with it. But, much to his dismay, an otherworldly being had other plans, due to finding Klaus as a source of entertainment.In snatching away his desired death, Klaus Mikaelson was reincarnated into another world as a young magic caster named Stiles Stilinski. With no choice but to live, Klaus decides to use this opportunity to take over Beacon Hills and make it his kingdom.And maybe one day, he'll be strong enough to find a way back home to his world.
